name: Shadow Drift - Duplicate Resume Spend
failure_mode: A single correlation trail now emits duplicate high-tier spend and cache misses even though the routing rules still look syntactically valid.
detection: Use Day 9 telemetry and budget evidence only. The downstream signal is runaway cost on one routed workflow path.
remediation: 1. Trace the duplicate spend through Day 9 evidence. 2. Patch the current-day routing or budget surface. 3. Re-run the Day 9 verification path.
